title: Two men shot dead in Asla Park
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men, foreign nationals, were found dead with a single gunshot wound to each of their chests inside their home in the Giyani informal settlement yesterday morning, 5 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men, foreign nationals, were found dead with a single gunshot wound to each of their chests inside their home in the Giyani informal settlement yesterday morning, 5 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A police spokesperson, Lieutenant Colonel Malcolm Pojie, said their friend discovered their bodies at about 09:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He had last seen them on Saturday afternoon and returned to their home on Sunday morning to cook for them, when he came upon their bodies.","html":"He had last seen them on Saturday afternoon and returned to their home on Sunday morning to cook for them, when he came upon their bodies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pojie said the motive is not yet known and the suspects are still at large. A case of double murder has been opened and is being investigated by the KwaNonqaba Police.","html":"Pojie said the motive is not yet known and the suspects are still at large. A case of double murder has been opened and is being investigated by the KwaNonqaba Police."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pojie has urged anyone with any information on the incident to contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or provide information through the My SAPS app, anonymously if needs be.","html":"Pojie has urged anyone with any information on the incident to contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or provide information through the My SAPS app, anonymously if needs be."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Two men shot dead in Asla Park
